message:
Command `# The step 36 antenna check reads: TECH_LEF + CELL_LEFS (sky130) + padframe LEFs
# Let's check if there's a MACRO_LEF (padframe LEF which would be very large)
grep "MACRO_LEF\|^set ::env.*LEF" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/_env.tcl | grep -v "TECH_LEF\|CELL_LEF" | head -5

echo "---"
du -sh /nc/apps/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af/sky130A/libs.ref/sky130_fd_sc_hd/lef/ 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.
